Event: Way of the Turtle
Event Date: 01/06/2020
Sage Bot Item Code: AR146


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Turtle's Wisdom Outfit

On death, imbues the ally with the least health with the power of a turtle. The imbued ally restores 50000 health over 3 sec and reflects 40% of the damage taken until the battle ends. When that ally is killed, the turtle's power transfers to another ally with the least health.
Transfers up to 3 times per battle.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
